name: Armor of the Unending Hunt
special_properties: Silent Moves (+5 competence to Move Silently)
description: This +2 shadow silent moves studded leather armor blends the wearer into shadow and muffles movement. Favored by rangers and rogues who pursue prey across great distances, it grants a +5 competence bonus to both Hide and Move Silently checks.

name: Dragonhide Plate
description: This +3 full plate is crafted from the scales of a red dragon. In addition to its enhancement bonus, it grants the wearer fire resistance 10. It does not impose the normal arcane spell failure chance for druids (dragonhide is a natural material). Paladins and dragon hunters prize this armor.

name: Mithral Breastplate +3
special_properties: Mithral (no arcane spell failure for medium armor proficiency)
description: This +3 mithral breastplate is treated as light armor for purposes of movement and proficiency, with no armor check penalty. It imposes no arcane spell failure chance, making it the premiere choice for arcane warriors and sword-and-sorcery types.

name: Shield of Arrow Deflection
special_properties: Arrow Deflection (deflect one ranged attack per round as immediate action, DC 20 Reflex)
description: This +2 arrow deflection heavy steel shield can deflect one ranged attack per round. As an immediate action, the wielder can attempt to deflect a ranged attack (DC 20 Reflex save); on success, the attack is negated. This ability works against arrows, bolts, sling bullets, and similar projectiles but not spell effects.

name: Buckler of the Ram
special_properties: Shield Bash (+2 enhancement on bash attacks)
Ram (on shield bash: DC 18 Fort or pushed back 5 ft.)
description: This +2 buckler has a ram's head design and is enchanted for aggressive shield use. Shield bash attacks with this buckler deal +2 enhancement damage. On a successful shield bash, the target must make a DC 18 Fortitude save or be pushed back 5 feet (no AoO from the movement).

name: Twilight Mithral Chain Shirt
description: This +1 mithral chain shirt carries the twilight enchantment, reducing its arcane spell failure chance by 10% (to 0% for mithral chain shirts). It is the definitive light armor for elven spellsword warriors and arcane archers who wish to avoid arcane spell failure entirely while maintaining mobility.
